  as={"h1"}

</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/invites/{token}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Rate-limited to 30 attempts per 15 minutes per IP (token enumeration
protection).
